news.title: China's Z.ai reportedly powers up 1GW data center built entirely on domestic chips
news.description: Chinese AI developer Z.ai has completed a giant data center running exclusively on domestically made chips, a milestone in Beijing's drive to replace restricted Nvidia silicon for future AI development.
